mapper.insert: insert into batch.pipeline_progress (tenant_id, pipeline_instance_id, stage, position_marker, processed_count, completed, created_at, updated_at) values (#{tenantId}, #{pipelineInstanceId}, #{stage}, #{positionMarker}, #{processedCountIncrement}, false, current_timestamp, current_timestamp) on conflict (tenant_id, pipeline_instance_id, stage) do update set position_marker = case when batch.pipeline_progress.completed then batch.pipeline_progress.position_marker else EXCLUDED.position_marker end, processed_count = case when batch.pipeline_progress.completed then batch.pipeline_progress.processed_count else batch.pipeline_progress.processed_count + #{processedCountIncrement} end, updated_at = current_timestamp

insert into batch.pipeline_progress (tenant_id, pipeline_instance_id, stage, position_marker, processed_count, completed, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{tenantId}, #{pipelineInstanceId}, #{stage}, null, 0, true, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp) on conflict (tenant_id, pipeline_instance_id, stage) do update set completed = true, completed_at = coalesce(batch.pipeline_progress.completed_at, current_timestamp), updated_at = current_timestamp
